allocation.html: Use this when a user reports being unable to enroll a student or issues related to enrollment being closed, and you have verified that the remaining balance is <= 0.
no-problem.html: General response template when checking the system and notifying the student that there are no issues.
drop-out.html: Used when users report being unable to create a drop-out ticket.
incorrect-product-pricing.html: Use this when a user reports an error in their tuition fee or product pricing.
make-order-failed: Response when users report being unable to create an order (make order failed), dont add product or cannot find customer information.
no-payment-date: Response when users report being unable to select a payment date when adding payment (can't addpay), or issues related to payment date and order creation date or error "Ngày chi trả phải sau ngày tạo order", just use when ticket refer to "THE PAYMENT DATE"
not-active.html: Send notification when the system detects the course is currently not active.
not-resale-upsale: Response when users report being UNABLE to create or perform resale/upsale operations. Note: if it does not mention being UNABLE to perform resale or upsale, it is not related.
pay-not-full.html: Use this when a user requests to open a slot to enroll a student, but after allocating funds, the remaining balance is > 0. This notifies them of the partial payment and serves as a reminder to pay the remaining tuition fee.
refund-reward-point.html: Notification related to refunding reward points/student points.
request-re-running.html: Used when users request re-running - requesting to reopen a class (for finished classes).
slot-enrollment-error.html: Use this when users report random slot jumping errors, or when enrolling students and first slots.
sync-v2-to-v1.html: Notification that customer account data is being synced and updated between the CRM V2 system and the legacy V1 version.
tick-uncompleted.html: Sent to students when the student status is related to tick uncompleted.
